field_definitions.rare_module_track_enabled: Boolean flag that marks rows governed by the rare setup research-only track.
field_definitions.rare_module_validation_class: One of the standardized rare-module validation classes.
field_definitions.fold_adequacy_status: Module-level fold adequacy; sparse rare modules use low_activity_not_fully_interpretable.
field_definitions.fold_interpretability: Whether module-level folds are interpretable, low-activity, or rare-track compatible.
field_definitions.rare_module_registration_decision: Research-only registration decision, never paper approval.
field_definitions.rare_module_revisit_condition: Condition for revisiting with more data or playbook-level evidence.
field_definitions.rare_module_portfolio_role: Rare setup diversifier / rare setup module / none.
field_definitions.module_level_fold_warning: Required warning when module-level folds are sparse.
